name: Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Add half a cup of nuts to the prepared brownie mix.
2. Pour the mixture into the two pie shells.
3. Sprinkle the remaining nuts on top.
4. Bake for 20 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
The brownie mixture should be slightly underdone when finished.
5. Serve hot or cold with mocha ice cream.
Serves 12.
